sketches.mechanism: A receive from a nil channel blocks forever; the runtime treats it as communication with no possible partner rather than as an immediate error.
sketches.resonance: The listener is suspended not by silence, but by the absence of any channel through which silence could arrive.

sketches.mechanism: An empty variant type has no constructors, and a refutation case is accepted only when the compiler can prove the pattern is impossible.
sketches.resonance: Absence is answered by a branch whose body can exist only because no one can ever enter it.

sketches.mechanism: A constrained subtype performs a range check on assignment; a value outside the declared world raises Constraint_Error during elaboration.
sketches.resonance: Tomorrow is rejected not by choice, but because the day has been defined too narrowly to contain it.
